full_text:
Experimental Plan

Experiment: Dissociation protocol optimization S470_pOme

Objective: Optimize the dissociation protocol to isolate more fibroblasts from ovarian tumors.

Approaches:

1. *Using trypsin and collagenase & hyaluronidase*:

Condition 1: 20 min 0.125 % trypsin and 1 hour C&H

Condition 2: 20 min 0.125 % trypsin and 2 hours C&H

Condition 3: 20 min 0.125 % trypsin, 1 hour C&H, followed by brief 0.125% trypsin of the cell pellet

Condition 4: 20 min 0.125 % trypsin, 2 hours C&H, followed by brief 0.125% trypsin of the cell pellet

2. *Using dispase followed by collagenase & hyaluronidase*:

Condition 5: Dispase for 30 min, followed by C&H for 30 min

Condition 6: Dispase for 30 min, followed by C&H for 1 hour

Experimental Steps:

1. *Sample Preparation*:

Collected ovarian tumor samples and washed the larger tumor pieces by placing them into a 50 ml Falcon tube, pouring sterile HBSS on top, and gently inverting the tube several times.

Approx. ⅔ of the tumor pieces were sliced and divided into two 50 ml Falcon tubes for conditions 1&2 and 3&4.

The remaining ⅓ of the tumor pieces were minced into smaller pieces using a sterile scalpel and scissors, and then transferred into a 50 ml Falcon tube for conditions 5 and 6.

2. *Dissociation Protocols*:

*Collagenase & hyaluronidase-only conditions*:

Treated 1&2 and 3&4 with 0.125 % trypsin for 20 min in +37°C water bath.

0.125 % trypsin solution: 10 ml DPBS (without MgCl2 and CaCl2) + 10 ml 0.25% trypsin EDTA

Gently inverted the tubes a few times after 10 min and at the end of the incubation period.

After incubation, took the tissue pieces out and placed them into two cell culture dishes for mincing. To the two cell suspension, added 20 ml DMEM/F12+++ media each, centrifuged 300 g 5 min RT, and resuspended both tubes in 1 ml. Pooled the cell suspension together and marked this cell suspension as sample 1-4.

Minced the sliced tissue pieces into tiny pieces, and divided the contents of the two plates into two 50 ml Falcon tubes each. In summary, we had separate 50 ml Falcon tubes for each condition (1 to 4)

Treated samples with C&H for the specified durations (at +37°C rotating). Vortexed approx. 15 times before and after the incubation period.

C&H dissociation media: 8.9 ml DMEM/F12+++ media + 1 ml C&H (10x stock) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

Filtered the samples with a 70 µm cell strainer to obtain single-cell suspensions

Pre-wetted the filter with 1 ml DMEM/F12+++, transferred the digested suspension through the strainer into a 50 ml Falcon tube, washed the stainer with 5 ml media, and discarded the leftover tissue pieces. Centrifuged the cell suspension 10 min 1000 rpm at +4°C

Red blood cell lysis:

For condition 2 and condition 4, added 6 ml RBC lysis buffer and incubated 7 min at RT.

For condition 1 and condition 3, first added 5 ml RBC lysis buffer and incubated 7 min at RT. Repeated the RBC lysis with 1 ml lysis buffer and incubated 2 min at RT.

After incubations, 10 ml DMEM/F12+++ on top and centrifuged 10 min 1000 rpm at +4°C.

For condition 2 and 4, added 0.125% trypsin and incubate for 15 seconds.

trypsin media: 1 ml PBS + 1 ml trypsin (0.25 % stock)

After that, diluted the trypsin with fresh DMEM/F12+++ media and centrifuged 10 min 1000 rpm at +4°C.

After RBC lysis (conditions 1 and 3) and after the second trypsin treatment (conditions 2 and 4), resuspended the pellets in 5 ml DMEM/F12+++, and aliquoted a 1:10 dilution for counting.

*Dispase followed by collagenase conditions* - conditions 5 and 6

Treated sample 5&6 with dispase for 30 minutes at +37°C rotating. Vortexed approx. 15 times before and after the incubation period.

dispase dissociation media: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ + 200 µl dispase 50 (U/ml stock) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

Filtered the samples with 70 µm cell strainer to obtain single-cell suspensions

Pre-wetted the filter with 1 ml DMEM/F12+++, transferred the digested suspension through the strainer into a 50 ml Falcon tube, and washed the stainer with 5 ml media.

Kept the leftover tissue pieces for C&H treatment.

Cell suspension (sample 5&6, only dispase) was centrifuged 10 min 1000 rpm at +4°C. RBC lysis was performed with 5 ml of lysis buffer for 5 minutes at RT. Then, added 10 ml of DMEM/F12+++ media, centrifuged again 10 minutes 1000 rpm +4°C. The pellet was resuspended in 5 ml of media.

Leftover tissue pieces were divided into two 50 ml Falcon tubes for condition 5 and condition 6.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue with C&H for specified durations. Vortexed approx. 15 times before and after the incubation period.

C&H dissociation media: 8.9 ml DMEM/F12+++ media + 1 ml C&H (10x stock) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

Filtered the samples with 70 µ cell stainer to obtain single-cell suspensions.

Pre-wetted the filter with 1 ml DMEM/F12+++, transferred the digested suspension through the strainer into a 50 ml Falcon tube, and washed the stainer with 5 ml media.

Red blood cell lysis:

5 ml RBC lysis buffer and incubated 5 min at RT.

Then, 10 ml DMEM/F12+++ on top and centrifuged 10 min 1000 rpm at +4°C.

Resuspended the pellets in 5 ml DMEM/F12+++, and aliquoted a 1:10 dilution for counting.

Made approx. 1.5 E6 cell aliquots for flow cytometry (calculated 1.5 [cells] / cell count [cells/ml])

mesothelial cells/sample 1-4 (only trypsin dissociation): aliquoted 1 ml (3.93 E6 cells in 2 ml)

condition 1: aliquoted 38 µl

condition 2: aliquoted 34 µl

condition 3: aliquoted 54 µl

condition 4: aliquoted 30 µl

condition 5: aliquoted 40 µl

condition 6: aliquoted 40 µl

Plated one plate of each sample/condition

mesothelial cells/sample 1-4 (only trypsin dissociation): ~1 E6 cells in a 10 cm cell culture, plate, ¼ on the 2 ml cell suspension with a total of 3.93 E6 cells

condition 1: 0.7 E6 cells in a 6 cm cell culture plate, 16.9 µl of the cell suspension

condition 2: 0.7 E6 cells in a 6 cm cell culture plate, 15.04 µl of the cell suspension

condition 3: 0.7 E6 cells in a 6 cm cell culture plate, 24.2 µl of the cell suspension

condition 4: 0.7 E6 cells in a 6 cm cell culture plate, 13.5 µl of the cell suspension

condition 5: 0.7 E6 cells in a 6 cm cell culture plate, 26.13 µl of the cell suspension

condition 6: 0.7 E6 cells in a 6 cm cell culture plate, 26.3 µl of the cell suspension

Freeze 5 vials from sample 5&6 (dispase dissociation only): 2 E6 cells per cryotube. Tubes are labeled as S470_pOme Dispase 2E6 cells 25.07.24 MH

3. *Flow Cytometry*:

Stained with the whole FC panel.

Samples:

sample 1-4 = mesothelial cells

condition 1

condition 2

condition 3

condition 4

condition 5

condition 6

FMO samples

DCM FMO

CD45 FMO

EpCAM (CD326) FMO

a-SMA FMO

CD29 FMO

CD31 FMO

PDGFR-β FMO

FAP FMO

unstained sample

FMO samples and unstained sample were aliquoted from the condition 2 cell suspension

Washed cells once with 900 µl FACS buffer (centrifuge 6min 400 g at +4°C).

Diluted the antibodies in Brilliant stain buffer (#563794 BD Horizon), added 50 µl of the antibody mix to cells, and incubated 30 min at +4°C and an additional 10 min at RT shielded from light.

After incubation, washed once with 900 µl FACS buffer.

Added 200 µl IC Fixation buffer (#00-8222 Invitrogen) to fix the cells and incubated for 40 min at +4°C shielded from light.

After incubation, 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer, and incubated 5 min at +4°C.

Centrifuged, washed the pellet with 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer, and resuspended in 900 µl FACS buffer for overnight storage.

Next day, centrifuged, diluted intracellular antibody in Permeabilization buffer, and resuspended pellet into 50 µl antibody mix. Incubate 30 min at +4°C and an additional 10 min at RT shielded from light.

Washed once with 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer and resuspended in 400 µl FACS buffer.

Pipeted the cell suspension through 5 ml Falcon polystyrene tube with a cell-strainer cap (blue).

Preparation of compensation controls

Added one drop of both positive (BD CompBeads AntiMouse IgG, #51-90-9001229) and negative (CompBeads Negative Control #51-90-9001291) compensation beads to 5ml Falcon polystyrene round bottom tubes (white cap).

For stained compensation controls, 2 µl of each antibody

the same antibodies as in FC panel except CD16-BV510 instead of BV510-DCM.

Incubated approx. 45 min at +4°C shielded from light and resuspended to 350 µl FACS buffer.

Analyze the samples to determine the percentage of live FAP+ fibroblasts (CD45- EpCAM- CD31-, FAP+ cells).
